assertions.expectation: Recommends migrating all 'No channel' clusters to release channels as a first priority
assertions.reason: Explicitly identifies 'No channel' clusters as Tier 1 Critical requiring immediate action and provides specific gcloud commands to migrate to release channels in Phase 1

assertions.expectation: Mentions using gcloud container clusters get-upgrade-info to check each cluster's auto-upgrade status, target versions, and EoS timestamps
assertions.reason: Includes the specific command 'gcloud container clusters get-upgrade-info' in both the assessment script and as a standalone tool for checking upgrade status

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for identifying clusters using deprecated APIs
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud commands for checking deprecation insights and emphasizes it as the #1 upgrade blocker, calling it critical

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking EoS timelines for each cluster and prioritizing those closest to EoS
assertions.reason: Lists 'Versions approaching/past End of Support' as Tier 1 Critical and includes EoS timestamp checking in the assessment script

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as an ongoing monitoring tool
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud logging sink commands for EoS alerts and includes it in the monitoring section

assertions.expectation: Recommends enrolling in scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance) for all clusters
assertions.reason: Does not mention 72-hour advance upgrade notifications or scheduled upgrade notifications enrollment

assertions.expectation: Suggests standardizing on a channel strategy: dev→Rapid, staging→Regular, prod→Stable/Extended
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends 'Dev environments: Regular channel, Staging: Regular channel, Prod: Stable channel OR Regular' with detailed rationale

assertions.expectation: May mention rollout sequencing as an advanced option for fleet-wide upgrade ordering — should not be the primary recommendation for fleet remediation
assertions.reason: Does not mention rollout sequencing as a primary recommendation, focusing instead on channel-based timing control and maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE Insights and Recommendations in the console for identifying issues like version skew
assertions.reason: Dedicates a section to 'GKE Insights & Recommendations' and mentions using gcloud recommender commands for insights and recommendations
